modules.datatypes_legacy.classes package#

Submodules#

modules.datatypes_legacy.classes.contour module#

class Contour(**kwargs)[source]#

Bases: object

Class representing a RECONSTRUCT Contour.

isNegative()[source]#

Check if the trace is a negative trace.

overlaps(other)[source]#

Check if contour completely overlaps another in Reconstruct space.

modules.datatypes_legacy.classes.image module#

class Image(**kwargs)[source]#

Bases: object

Class representing a RECONSTRUCT Image.

attributes()[source]#

Return relevent attributes as dict.

modules.datatypes_legacy.classes.section module#

class Section(**kwargs)[source]#

Bases: object

Class representing a RECONSTRUCT Section.

attributes()[source]#

Return a dict of this Section’s attributes.

eq(other, eq_type=None)[source]#

Check equivalency with the option for type of attributes to compare.

Default: __eq__

transformAllContours(tform, reverse=False)[source]#

Transform all traces on a single section.

transformAllImages(tform, reverse=False)[source]#

Transform/translate all the images for a single section.

modules.datatypes_legacy.classes.series module#

class Series(**kwargs)[source]#

Bases: object

Class representing a RECONSTRUCT Series.

attributes()[source]#

Return a dict of this Series” attributes.

modules.datatypes_legacy.classes.transform module#

class Transform(**kwargs)[source]#

Bases: object

Class representing a RECONSTRUCT Transform.

property dim#
getTformList()[source]#
property inverse#

Return the inverse of the transform.

inverseTransformPoints(points)[source]#
isAffine()[source]#

Returns True if the transform is affine.

tform()[source]#

Return an np.array object of the forward tform.

transformPoints(points)[source]#
x_forward(x, y)[source]#

Forward transform x.

xy_forward(x, y)[source]#

Forward transform (x,y).

xy_inverse(x, y)[source]#

Inverse transform (x, y).

y_forward(x, y)[source]#

Forward transform y.
